text:
感谢 360 安全龙虾成为“歸藏 PPT Skill”的金牌赞助商！

我一直在想找一个可持续的方案来更新 PPT Skills，因为更新主题实在太费人力了。

基本上是我一个人在一页一页地调，非常耗时间。所以我开始引入赞助商。

目前产品依然是开源的，赞助商那边会同步更新，我也会帮忙做一些小的适配工作。 https://t.co/WJhLKLXH9f
这里尝试：https://t.co/WXUBRgMxHo

有些既要免费用，他自己不想赞助，又不想别人给我赞助，即使这个就是在 Readme 页面贴个 Logo，这都不行。

而且这些人也没说给捐个款，可能连点赞都没有，太难伺候了

收到了 @dotey  宝玉老师的图解 Skill，已严肃阅读

里面的配图都很有意思，非常适合理解内容，要是对 Skill 学习有需求可以看看 https://t.co/zbhroZvtw5
The reason for my obsession around super apps is that in 6 months there will be nothing they can’t do. We’re just early

For a year, every AI account on this app has said the same thing: "Hollywood is cooked. Anyone can make a movie now."

The first real AI feature film just came out. It cost $500,000.

The receipts say the opposite of what they've been selling you. https://t.co/2zsmrNiCYs

Hell Grind is a 95-minute AI film from a startup trying to sell its video tool.

Of the $500,000 budget, $400,000 went to compute alone.

So before a single human got paid, the AI bill was already four times most people's annual salary. https://t.co/x9DZKKLKMT

"Anyone can do this" falls apart the second you read how it was made.

The first 25 minutes took 16,181 generations.
Every 15 seconds of footage needed a 3,000-word prompt.
It took 15 professional directors, editors, and DPs two weeks.

This was not someone on a laptop.

The cost of making a film didn't disappear.

It moved.

It went from cameras, crews, and locations to compute, prompt labor, and people who already know how film works.

Cheaper than $50M, sure. Free and effortless? Nowhere close.

Look at the real number: 16,181 generations produced 253 usable shots.

The AI made 16,000 things nobody used.
Humans made 253 decisions that mattered.

The expensive part was never the generating. It was knowing which 253 to keep.

"Hollywood is cooked" is a take from people who never saw the bill.

The tools got powerful. The skill ceiling went up with them.

A model can generate forever. It still can't tell you which shot is the right one.

That part costs $400,000 and a team who knows what they're doing.

By the way, here's something that won't cost hundreds of thousands.

Turn Claude into 20+ different specialists for marketing & business.

Install real expertise, not just prompts.

Get my Claude skills bundle 👇
https://t.co/4GX8faMyEP

The dumbest-looking line in my CLAUDE. md is the most useful thing in it.

It tells Claude to call me "God" in every single reply.

Sounds like a joke. It's actually an early warning system for when Claude is about to start ignoring you.

Here's why it works.

Claude doesn't fail https://t.co/GSOL2EQrSl

RT @godofprompt: Stanford ran 3,680 sessions on Claude, GPT-5.2, and Gemini.

Overworked AI agents started questioning the system they ran…

RT @godofprompt: We gave agents tools before we gave them memory.

That was backwards.

Now they can browse, code, email, book meetings, hi…

RT @godofprompt: For a year, every AI account on this app has said the same thing: "Hollywood is cooked. Anyone can make a movie now."

The…

最近@HyperFrames_ 展示了通过HTML 就能出📽️视频mp4；

很多人在 codex 里面用，但是找模板、编辑、预览都不太方便；

我们团队内部专门开发了一个 html 视频版“剪映”：
集成了效果顶尖的 hyperframes 模板，同时支持分页内容编辑，用来做产品发布视频、知识解读视频都非常不错🔥；

有人希望开源吗🙌 https://t.co/JN1LfjU4Qa

目前支持了：
1、10 多套顶尖 html 视频模板；
2、直接读取文章、链接生成视频；
3、分页内容编辑；
4、生成视频配乐；
5、连接本地 Agent 直接用。

还有什么你想要的？留言告诉我 https://t.co/PJOWQZBrAY
分享一些最近用这个项目做的视频样例 https://t.co/oXUVQQndMZ

Open Design 现在集成了最近 X 上最火、也可能是最完整的一套 AI design skills，也包括Taste Skill、Hallmark Skill 在内🔥🔥🔥

以前用 AI agent 做 app，最痛苦就是疯狂调 prompt、死磕审美的环节。

现在不用了。接上 Open Design，你的本地 agent 就不只是会写前端，而是开始有 design taste 了。

NVIDIA GTC 2026 全记录

中英文双语 https://t.co/pZDm117bUp

AI 在医疗应用中不再只是“看片子找病灶”，而是能替医生提前模拟“这个治疗方案，三个月后病人会怎样”。

可以模拟多种治疗方案，直接告诉医生哪个最好。

真实世界里根本不允许你多试几次，而这，恰好是世界模型最值钱的地方，AI提供多种决策模拟，由人类来进行最终决策。

Claude Code 升级为4.8后老是出这个

The model's tool call could not be parsed (retry also failed). 

你们遇到过吗？

好烦

/model claude-opus-4-6 

使用上面的命令切换到4.6
